title: My AI Memory Now Follows Me Across Every Tool!
summary: Walrus Memory is a cross-agent memory layer that stores context outside individual AI tools and allows different agents to retrieve shared encrypted memories. The service provides user-owned, encrypted memory management with granular access control across multiple AI providers.
